task_text:
Create a UTF-8 text file named smoke_note.txt in the repo root.
Write exactly this one line into the file: hello from sdk runtime smoke
Do not modify any other files.
Then output exactly these two human-readable lines and nothing else before the structured capsule:
STATUS: OK
FILE: smoke_note.txt
After those two lines, append exactly one run-result capsule with:
changed_files: smoke_note.txt
tests_passed: unknown
error_type: <empty>
error_message: <empty>
acceptance: smoke_note.txt contains exactly: hello from sdk runtime smoke
reply includes STATUS: OK and FILE line
